meta_op: Detect methods that are static
Detect methods that have a trivial body
Detect methods that are overloaded operators
Detect classes that have dependent base classes
Detect methods that are templates
Detect methods that are in a dependent context
Detect methods defined inside a macro definition
Match the canonical declaration of a method against an inner matcher
Detect methods whose body uses the 'this' pointer
Match methods that are definitions
Match methods that are user-provided
Exclude methods expanded in system headers
Exclude virtual methods
Exclude constructors
Exclude destructors
Exclude conversion operators
Exclude methods whose class is a lambda
Exclude methods whose class has dependent bases
Exclude methods whose class is either a lambda or has dependent bases
Exclude methods whose canonical declaration is inside a macro definition
Exclude methods that use the 'this' pointer
Match methods that satisfy all required conditions for conversion to static
meta_impl:
Finder->addMatcher(
  cxxMethodDecl(
    isDefinition(),
    isUserProvided(),
    unless(anyOf(
      isExpansionInSystemHeader(),
      isVirtual(),
      isStatic(),
      hasTrivialBody(),
      isOverloadedOperator(),
      cxxConstructorDecl(),
      cxxDestructorDecl(),
      cxxConversionDecl(),
      isTemplate(),
      isDependentContext(),
      ofClass(anyOf(isLambda(), hasAnyDependentBases())),
      isInsideMacroDefinition(),
      hasCanonicalDecl(isInsideMacroDefinition()),
      usesThis()))
  ).bind(" x "),
  this);
